API Routes
Payments (Stripe)
GET/api/payments/publishable-key
POST/api/payments/create-intentwallet top-up
POST/api/payments/webhookStripe-signed
Simulation (v1)
GET/api/v1/health
POST/api/v1/wallet/topup
POST/api/v1/fx/quote
POST/api/v1/remittance/initiate
POST/api/v1/simulation/seed
POST/api/v1/simulation/reset

GET/api/admin/dashboard/alerts

Risk Config
GET/api/v1/risk/config

Sumsuma — Non-custodial mobile banking for the Ethiopian diaspora
